variants: Currently residing in Walnut Haven, Constantin Mihalache hails from the charming town of Heatherbloom Downs. Recognized for his accomplishments in metallurgy, he is a dedicated member of the Emberwing Metallurgists Guild. His well-regarded book, the 'Gearbloom Prototyping Manual', has proven invaluable to many practitioners and hobbyists in the field. For his exceptional contributions, Constantin was honored with the Umbral Crest Merit, reflecting his innovative spirit. His work continues to inspire aspiring metallurgists and enrich the community.
